rule.desc: For numerical data, use numpy/pandas (vectorized operations).

examples.example: `PATTERN = re.compile(r"..."); PATTERN.match(text)` not `re.match(r"...", text)` in loop.

rule.desc: Use sets for membership testing (`in`), not lists.

examples.example: `ALLOWED = {"a", "b", "c"}; if x in ALLOWED` faster than list.

rule.desc: Import expensive modules only when needed.

examples.example: `def plot(): import matplotlib; ...` if matplotlib not always used.
